fight_director.fight_intent: weapon clash that proves equal force before a reversal
fight_director.tactical_objective: stop the staff sweep and open a counter line
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: staff opponent sweeps from low left to high right, forcing the hero to block late
fight_director.spatial_map: flat graphic side axis, hero right, opponent left, diagonal weapon lines cross center frame
fight_director.result_state: weapons locked center frame, hero blade angles upward for next counter
fight_director.readability_plan: bold silhouettes and one held impact frame make the collision readable

combat_beat.screen_action: sword catches the staff sweep in a graphic crossed-weapon impact
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: hero survives pressure and creates a counter opening
combat_beat.anticipation: two silhouettes freeze for a half beat before the staff arc
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: blade edge and staff center cross at screen center
combat_beat.impact_feedback: black ink burst and white spark lines radiate from the crossing point
combat_beat.reaction: both sleeves snap back, staff opponent slides one foot
combat_beat.aftermath: ink smear trails remain behind the weapon arcs
combat_beat.camera_logic: locked side composition, no camera shake
combat_beat.vfx_logic: brushstroke energy follows weapon arcs and never covers the crossing point
combat_beat.continuity_out: hero blade now points upward for the next counter

impact_system.hitstop: held impact frame with ink splash
impact_system.recoil: weapon arcs bounce apart and sleeves snap
impact_system.environment_feedback: ink flecks and speed lines streak outward
impact_system.aftermath_pose: hero stays planted, opponent foot slides back

vfx_power.color_temperature: black ink, white sparks, muted red accent
vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame

camera_coverage.screen_direction: staff sweeps left to right, sword rises right to left
camera_coverage.cut_point: after recoil and upward blade line
camera_coverage.continuity_from_previous: opponent begins staff sweep from left
camera_coverage.continuity_to_next: hero counter follows upward blade line

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: locked side pose before staff sweep
provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: weapons rebound, hero blade angled upward
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: prioritize silhouette, weapon crossing, held impact frame, recoil

key_poses: weapon or limb enters the contact line
clear collision pose with readable overlap
brief hitstop at the contact point
end pose preserves the next cut direction
action_events: guard meets the weapon or strike
combat_tempo.force_feedback: hitstop, sparks or rain spray, and body recoil reveal force transfer
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: short traversal or weapon entry resolves before contact; contact and reaction fill the back half
combat_tempo.speed_curve: anticipation, burst into contact, held impact frame, recoil, controlled end pose; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

prompt_canonical_en: Original 2D ink martial fantasy animation, bold silhouettes, staff sweep meets rising sword, clear crossed-weapon impact frame, ink burst, recoil, no copied IP style.
provider_execution_prompt: Original 2D ink martial fantasy animation. Locked side composition: staff opponent on screen left sweeps low-to-high, sword hero on screen right raises blade to catch the staff at center frame. Hold one clear crossed-weapon impact frame with black ink burst and white spark lines radiating outward. Both weapons rebound, sleeves snap back, opponent slides one foot, hero blade ends angled upward for a counter. Bold silhouettes, brushstroke energy, no copied IP, no gore, no subtitles.

qc_evidence.action_readability: Locked side view and bold silhouettes keep the weapon crossing legible.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: Hero blocks the staff sweep to open a counter line.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: Blade and staff cross at the center with a held contact frame.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Ink burst, white spark lines, sleeve snap, and sliding foot show feedback.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: Opponent remains left and hero remains right along one graphic axis.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: Brushstroke energy follows arcs and avoids covering the crossing point.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: The prompt uses original 2D ink martial fantasy language without naming IP.
qc_evidence.cutability: The upward blade line creates a clean transition into the next counter shot.
